title: fraxinus parvifolia
intro: Fraxinus parvifolia, also known as the Australian flame tree or small-leaved ash, is a small to medium-sized tree native to eastern Australia. The medicinal properties of Fraxinus parvifolia include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Fraxinus parvifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in Australia.
